sourceTitle: Statement on Guidance for the University of Pennsylvania Community on Use of Generative Artificial Intelligence
evidenceSnippetOriginal: Consult with your department leadership and your discipline's publishing standards to determine how the use of AI should be accounted for with regard to authorship in publications.
evidenceLocator: Additional Guidance > Guidance for Researchers section
